name: pricing-single
description: A single centred offer with nothing to prove against other columns: the price dominates, the benefit list unfolds into two columns on wide screens and one on mobile, and a single full-width CTA closes the card. Content reveals in a staggered upward motion and collapses to a plain fade under prefers-reduced-motion.

notes: The section title is an h2 that labels the section landmark; the plan name is an h3
The included-features list is a real ul
The CTA renders as a real link when given an href, otherwise a button, and references the plan name via aria-describedby
The entrance animation respects prefers-reduced-motion via MotionProvider

intents: a single-plan pricing section with one price and one CTA
a lifetime or one-off offer card with a benefit list
examples: <PricingSingle eyebrow="Offre de lancement" title="Un seul prix, tout compris" planName="Licence à vie" price="199 €" period="paiement unique" features={['Mises à jour à vie', 'Support par e-mail']} primaryAction={{ label: 'Acheter', href: '/checkout' }} note="Garantie 30 jours satisfait ou remboursé" />
